creator: freebsd@atypical.net
text:
Created attachment 222403
Screenshot of Sonarr complaining about Mono version

Sonarr reports in the latest version:

"Currently installed Mono version 5.10.1.57 is no longer supported. Please upgrade Mono to version 5.20."

Please change the dependency in net-p2p/sonarr-devel from mono-5.10 to mono-5.20. Thanks.
